stream_required: B.Com, BBA, BCA B.Tech (CSE) MBA (Marketing, HR & Marketing) or (Finance & Marketing)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: B.Com, BCA & BBA Stipend during 6 months of Internship : CTC 2.34 LPA (Rs 18,600/- in hand per month) Salary after 6 months of Internship : CTC 3 LPA - 4 LPA based On Performance (including 5% Variable) (Rs 25000/- in hand per month) B.Tech : Stipend during 6 months of Internship : CTC 2.34 LPA (Rs 18,600/- in hand per month) Salary after 6 months of Internship : CTC 4.5 LPA (including 5% Variable) (Rs 37,300/- in hand per month) MBA : Stipend during 6 months of Internship : CTC 2.34 LPA - 3 LPA Based On Interview Rating ( PT and ESI Deduction included) (Rs 18,600/- in hand per month) Salary after 6 months of Internship : CTC 5 LPA - 6.5 LPA Based on performance (including 5% Variable) (Rs 41,466/- in hand per month)
